items.headline: Veteran who hasn't played for England for 8 years is making a surprise run for the World Cup
items.description:
MANCHESTER, England (AP) — At the age of 35 and in the form of his life, England may have found the unlikely answer to a decade-long problem just in time for the World Cup.
Whether coach Thomas Tuchel takes a chance on a veteran striker who hasn't played for his country for eight years, is a question that's growing ever louder.

items.headline: This Date in Baseball - Miguel Cabrera of the Tigers becomes the 33rd member of the 3,000 hit club
items.description:
April 23
1903 — The New York Highlanders won their first game as a major league team, 7-2 over the Washington Senators.

items.headline: After Fernando Mendoza at No. 1, the NFL draft’s QB board could go quiet fast
items.description:
Don't expect a run of quarterbacks to go off the board in the first round of this year's NFL draft like what happened in 2021 and 2024.
There figures to be a long gap between Fernando Mendoza's coronation as the expected No. 1 pick by the Las Vegas Raiders and when the second quarterback on most public big boards, Ty Simpson, is expected to go.

items.headline: Magic's Jonathan Isaac: Listed out for Game 2
items.description: Isaac (knee) is out for Wednesday's Game 2 against the Pistons.

items.headline: Capitals' Rasmus Sandin: Undergoes knee surgery
items.description: Sandin underwent right knee surgery Tuesday for a torn ACL.

items.headline: Real Madrid's Federico Valverde: Assists Tuesday
items.description: Valverde assisted once to go with one shot (zero on goal), one cross (zero accurate) and one chance created in Tuesday's 2-1 victory over Deportivo Alaves.

items.headline: Royals' Isaac Collins: Idle Wednesday
items.description: Collins is out of the lineup for Wednesday's game against the Orioles.
